subject: [PATCH v5 1/5] sunrpc: route to a populated pool in svc_pool_for_cpu()

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch modifies the `svc_pool_for_cpu()` function in the sunrpc module to route incoming RPC requests to a populated pool, rather than one that is currently idle. This ensures that all incoming requests are serviced, even if some pools have no threads assigned to them. The change trades off NUMA locality for guaranteed service of incoming requests.
